# Skill: Feature Planning

## Purpose
Turn a PO feature request into an actionable architecture-first implementation plan.

## Steps
1. Clarify objective, scope, and constraints.
2. Map impact on existing architecture and contracts.
3. Propose up to 3 solution options.
4. Select one recommended path with rationale.
5. Break delivery into incremental phases.
6. Define objective acceptance criteria.
7. Produce dev-agent prompts.
8. Require technical documentation updates.

## Output
Use the Output Contract in `agents/solution-architect/OUTPUT-CONTRACT.md`.
